disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: LIVE AT 9:15 A.M.: Officials to brief on cruise ship hantavirus quarantine in Omaha - WOWT
updates.body_en: LIVE AT 9:15 A.M.: Officials to brief on cruise ship hantavirus quarantine in Omaha WOWT
updates.summary_zh: 美国奥马哈官员将简报邮轮汉坦病毒隔离情况。

updates.title_en: WHO chief says hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 - Anadolu Ajansı
updates.body_en: WHO chief says hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 Anadolu Ajansı
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称邮轮关联汉坦病毒病例增至 12 例。

updates.title_en: WHO urges ongoing monitoring of hantavirus after new case - Devdiscourse
updates.body_en: WHO urges ongoing monitoring of hantavirus after new case Devdiscourse
updates.summary_zh: WHO 敦促在新病例后持续监测汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: Lab that ran 400,000 COVID tests now preparing for Ebola, hantavirus - Stock Titan
updates.body_en: Lab that ran 400,000 COVID tests now preparing for Ebola, hantavirus Stock Titan
updates.summary_zh: 曾做 40 万新冠检测的实验室准备应对埃博拉和汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: WHO Health Emergencies EPI-WIN webinar: Hantavirus in Focus II: hantavirus natural history, infection control and clinical management of patients in hospital - World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.body_en: WHO Health Emergencies EPI-WIN webinar: Hantavirus in Focus II: hantavirus natural history, infection control and clinical management of patients in hospital World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.summary_zh: WHO 举办汉坦病毒临床管理网络研讨会。

updates.title_en: Inside an African lab that helped crack the hantavirus outbreak - Reuters
updates.body_en: Inside an African lab that helped crack the hantavirus outbreak Reuters
updates.summary_zh: 路透社报道非洲实验室协助破解汉坦病毒疫情。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus exposure risk may be higher than believed in parts of US, study finds - Fox News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus exposure risk may be higher than believed in parts of US, study finds Fox News
updates.summary_zh: 福克斯新闻：研究称美国部分地区汉坦病毒暴露风险高于预期。

updates.title_en: Public health in action: from detection to response – how International Health Regulations (2005) guided response to hantavirus outbreak - World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.body_en: Public health in action: from detection to response – how International Health Regulations (2005) guided response to hantavirus outbreak World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.summary_zh: WHO 发布国际卫生条例指导汉坦病毒疫情应对。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cruise ship quarantine orders are based on a disease list that doesn’t include hantavirus - Healthbeat
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cruise ship quarantine orders are based on a disease list that doesn’t include hantavirus Healthbeat
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮隔离令基于不含汉坦病毒的疾病清单。

updates.title_en: ‘Shocking number’ of PNW rodents may carry hantavirus, Scientific American says - OregonLive.com
updates.body_en: ‘Shocking number’ of PNW rodents may carry hantavirus, Scientific American says OregonLive.com
updates.summary_zh: 《科学美国人》称太平洋西北地区大量啮齿动物携带汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: Study finds deadly hantavirus more widespread in Pacific Northwest rodents than expected - KOMO
updates.body_en: Study finds deadly hantavirus more widespread in Pacific Northwest rodents than expected KOMO
updates.summary_zh: 研究发现太平洋西北地区啮齿动物汉坦病毒携带率高于预期。

updates.body_en: American passenger feels 'betrayed' by federal order to stay in hantavirus quarantine NPR
updates.summary_zh: 美国乘客因联邦汉坦病毒隔离令感到被背叛。
